title: medica tornata
intro: Medica tornata, also known as Mexican prickly poppy, is a plant species belonging to the family Papaveraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating conditions such as fever, cough, and bronchitis. Medica tornata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and ointments, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
